Escape Velocity Test Stats

A massive THANK YOU to everyone who helped test Escape Velocity.

Your contribution will live forever in the gameplay and ecosystem of Star Atlas, and we hope you had a phenomenal time making not just history, but also the future!  

Check out the image below for final Escape Velocity stats.
